subject: WM-0152 blocked
body: Public browser Worker/session bridge decision required: apps/web can send WM-0150 command payloads via @wuming-town/sim-protocol, but it has no reviewed public path to instantiate or talk to the authoritative Simulation Worker. apps/web package boundaries do not allow @wuming-town/sim-worker, and packages/sim-worker/src/browser-worker-entry.ts is internal-only. See coordination/reports/WM-0152.md for options and recommendation.
